report.summary: Built two SEO-optimized learn guides — Solana Liquid Staking Guide 2026 (with interactive LST yield calculator) and Corporate Crypto Treasury Guide 2026 — both added to PUBLISHED_PAGES.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Topic 1: Solana Liquid Staking — $8B+ TVL, 60.5M SOL in LSTs (14% of staked SOL), JitoSOL + Marinade dominance fell from 95% to 42%, Sanctum INF leads at 8.5% APY, STKESOL institutional launch Jan 2026

Topic 2: Corporate Crypto Treasuries (DATCos) — 1,132,867 BTC ($80.9B) held by public companies, Strategy Inc. holds 761K BTC (65.2%), BitMine accumulated 4.66M ETH ($12.9B), Pantera predicts 'brutal pruning' consolidation wave

Gap analysis: no existing Solana liquid staking guide (Bitcoin LST guide exists but not Solana), no broader corporate crypto treasury strategy guide (bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide exists but narrow scope)
Both topics highly search-relevant: 'solana liquid staking' and 'crypto treasury companies' trending in March 2026

sections.title: Content Created
items: /learn/solana-liquid-staking-guide-2026 — ~2,800 words, Intermediate level, 7 sections: What Is Solana Liquid Staking, How It Works, Top LSTs Compared (JitoSOL/mSOL/INF/JupSOL/STKESOL), Advanced Yield Strategies, Risks, Getting Started, FAQ (6 questions)

/learn/corporate-crypto-treasury-guide-2026 — ~3,000 words, Intermediate level, 8 sections: What Are DATCos, Strategy Playbook, Top Treasury Companies (BTC + ETH), Business Model, NAV Premium Analysis, Risks & Red Flags, Evaluation Framework, FAQ (5 questions)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Solana guide title: 'Solana Liquid Staking Guide 2026: LST Yields & APY' (50 chars)
Treasury guide title: 'Corporate Crypto Treasury Guide 2026' (37 chars)
Both pages: ArticleSchema + FAQSchema JSON-LD via combineSchemas
Both pages: OpenGraph (type: article, publishedTime: 2026-03-25) + Twitter card metadata
Solana guide targets: 'Solana liquid staking', 'JitoSOL', 'mSOL', 'Sanctum INF', 'SOL staking 2026'
Treasury guide targets: 'corporate crypto treasury', 'DATCo', 'MicroStrategy bitcoin', 'crypto treasury 2026'

Internal links: Solana guide links to staking-apy tool, DeFi ecosystem guide, advanced staking strategies; Treasury guide links to bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide, bitcoin-etf-guide, crypto-ira, portfolio-tracker

sections.title: Interactive Components
items: SolanaLSTCalculator.tsx — client component with 3 inputs (SOL amount, time period, SOL price) and comparison table of 5 LSTs showing APY, yield in SOL, yield in USD, end balance
Highlights best-performing LST automatically, includes summary tooltip
Embedded in solana-liquid-staking-guide-2026/page.tsx between comparison and yield strategies sections

sections.title: PUBLISHED_PAGES Updates
items: Added /learn/solana-liquid-staking-guide-2026 to PUBLISHED_PAGES (Day build cycle batch 4, Mar 25)
Added /learn/corporate-crypto-treasury-guide-2026 to PUBLISHED_PAGES (Day build cycle batch 4, Mar 25)
Fixed corporate treasury page: removed 'use client' directive (incompatible with metadata export), fixed import path from @/lib/seo to @/lib/structured-data
